scripts.docker:push: WEB_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./apps/web/package.json').version") && docker build -f apps/web/Dockerfile -t git.mateoleal.com/mateoleal/tennocompanion:$WEB_VERSION . && docker tag git.mateoleal.com/mateoleal/tennocompanion:$WEB_VERSION git.mateoleal.com/mateoleal/tennocompanion:latest && docker push git.mateoleal.com/mateoleal/tennocompanion:$WEB_VERSION && docker push git.mateoleal.com/mateoleal/tennocompanion:latest
